productDisplayName: Puma Men Excitemo TT Black Sports Shoes
description: Get ready to score those winning goals in style with the puma Excitemo men's soccer cleats. It's lightweight structure enables better ball control, while its ultra-durable and lightweight properties make this pair great for those who play those quick moves on the field. Upper Synthetic leather upper for a comfortable, durable Fit Asymmetrical lacing system for expanded ball control area Key points on the outsole have been enhanced for improved receiving and passing Dampening pods on the lateral side helps control the ball from the first touch Along the instep, a soft angled plate delivers friction to reduce ball spin and a hard plate helps with quick passes Midsole EVA sockliner for cushioning and to help reduce stud pressure Contoured sockliner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressure Outsole Lightweight outsole with optimized cleat placement for absolute traction, stability and durability Firm- ground (FG) cleats for use on short grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddy Durable TPU plate with strategically placed cleats that grip the ground and deliver reliable stability
